title: Error during startup System.Xml.XmlException
author: pouda
body_snippet:
<!-- Bug -->
|Application : mRemoteNG.exe
Version du Framework : v4.0.30319
Description : le processus a été arrêté en raison d'une exception non gérée.
Informations sur l'exception : System.Xml.XmlException
See complete error in attachment

l|Value|
|--:|---|
|Operating system | Windows 10 x64 |
|mRemoteNG version| : 1.75.7011.34963  |

[error.txt](https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/files/1487305/error.txt)

comments.author: pouda
comments.snippet: switching back to 7008 version and it's ok.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Packaged fix is now available in PR #3125: PR #3125 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG` This includes deterministic recovery from malformed primary XML by loading the newest valid backup and restoring the primary file, plus regression coverage in XmlConnectionsLoaderTests.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
